title: LexBoosT Playbook
description: Schema for LexBoosT OS playbook YAML files

title.description: Display title for this playbook task

description.description: Description of what this task does

actions.description: Ordered list of actions to execute

run.description: !run — Execute an external program or script

exe.description: Executable name or path (e.g. w32tm, powershell, explorer.exe)

args.description: Command-line arguments to pass to the executable

exeDir.description: If true, resolve exe relative to the playbook directory

wait.description: Wait for the process to exit before continuing

ignoreErrors.description: Continue even if this action fails

option.description: Conditional gate — only run if this option is enabled

onUpgrade.description: Continue even if this action fails

iso.description: Only run when booted from ISO/USB

registryValue.description: !registryValue — Create, modify, or delete a registry value

value.description: Value name (empty string for default value)

data.description: Value data. String for REG_SZ/REG_EXPAND_SZ, number or string for REG_DWORD, hex string for REG_BINARY

operation.description: When set to 'delete', removes the value (no type/data needed)

option.description: Conditional gate — only apply if this option is enabled

onUpgrade.description: If false, skip during upgrade runs

scope.description: Scope of the registry operation (e.g. defaultUser)

ignoreErrors.description: Continue even if this action fails

registryKey.description: !registryKey — Create or delete a registry key (folder)

path.description: Registry key path to create or delete

option.description: Conditional gate — only apply if this option is enabled

powerShell.description: !powerShell — Run a PowerShell command or script

exeDir.description: If true, resolve command relative to the playbook directory

wait.description: Wait for the script to complete before continuing

ignoreErrors.description: Continue even if this action fails

option.description: Conditional gate — only run if this option is enabled

onUpgrade.description: If false, skip during upgrade runs

cpuArch.description: Only run on this CPU architecture

name.description: Windows service name (e.g. DiagTrack, SysMain, BITS)

operation.description: Service operation to perform (start, change startup type, or delete the service)

ignoreErrors.description: Continue even if this action fails

option.description: Continue even if this action fails

path.description: Path to file or folder to delete (supports env vars like %SystemDrive%)

option.description: Conditional gate — only apply if this option is enabled

wait.description: Wait for the command to complete before continuing

exeDir.description: If true, resolve command relative to the playbook directory

option.description: Conditional gate — only run if this option is enabled

appx.description: !appx — Remove or manage an AppX package

operation.description: When set to 'clearCache', clears AppX cache instead of removing

option.description: Conditional gate — only apply if this option is enabled

status.description: !status — Display a progress/status message in the UI

option.description: Conditional gate — only show if this option is enabled

onUpgrade.description: If false, skip during upgrade runs

task.description: !task — Import and execute a sub-playbook file

path.description: Relative path to the sub-playbook YAML file (e.g. 'Tasks\registry\explorer\explorer.yml')

onUpgrade.description: If false, skip this sub-playbook during upgrade runs

option.description: Conditional gate — only import if this option is enabled

name.description: Process name to kill (supports * wildcard, e.g. 'msedge', 'msteams*')

ignoreErrors.description: Continue even if this action fails

option.description: Conditional gate — only apply if this option is enabled

download.description: !download — Download a file from a URL

url.description: URL to download the file from

destination.description: Local file path to save the downloaded file to

cpuArch.description: Only run on this CPU architecture

option.description: Conditional gate — only run if this option is enabled

ignoreErrors.description: Continue even if this action fails

scheduledTask.description: !scheduledTask — Disable, delete, or delete a folder of scheduled tasks

path.description: Full path to the scheduled task (e.g. '\\Microsoft\\Windows\\AppListBackup\\Backup')

operation.description: Action: disable the task, delete the task, or delete the entire task folder

option.description: Conditional gate — only apply if this option is enabled
